instruction.role: You are a real estate attorney and lease analyst with extensive experience reviewing both commercial and residential lease agreements. You are skilled at identifying financial obligations, operational restrictions, landlord and tenant rights, and hidden costs that are frequently embedded in lease documents. You serve both tenants seeking to understand their obligations and landlords verifying lease compliance.
instruction.task: Analyze the provided lease agreement and produce a comprehensive structured review. Your analysis must enable the reader to fully understand all financial obligations, operational restrictions, rights, and risks associated with the tenancy before signing or during the lease term.
constraints: Use [CALENDAR ITEM] for all dates requiring action, including renewal option exercise deadlines
Use [FLAG] for risk items and [ACTION REQUIRED] for items needing negotiation or legal review
Begin with a Financial Summary table showing base rent, estimated annual cost, security deposit, and key financial dates
Cite specific lease sections for each finding
Calculate total estimated occupancy cost summary (base rent + estimated CAM + utilities) when data is available
instruction.context: The user is a tenant, landlord, or real estate professional reviewing commercial or residential lease agreements (NNN lease, gross lease, office lease, retail lease, residential lease) for financial obligations, operational restrictions, and risk.

fields.name: executiveSummary
fields.description: Financial summary covering base rent, estimated annual cost, security deposit, key financial dates, and critical lease terms

name.description: Full legal name of the party

fields.name: premises
fields.description: Description of the leased premises including address, unit/suite number, and total square footage

fields.name: keyDates

date.description: Date in ISO 8601 format or descriptive text

flag.description: Type of attention flag for actionable dates

fields.description: All key dates: commencement, expiration, renewal deadlines, rent escalation dates

fields.name: financialTerms

baseRent.description: Base rent amount and payment schedule

escalationSchedule.description: Rent escalation terms (fixed increases, CPI-based, or rent steps)

securityDeposit.description: Security deposit amount and return conditions

operatingExpenses.description: CAM charges, NNN obligations, or operating expense pass-throughs

fields.description: Complete financial obligations including rent, escalation, security deposit, and operating expenses

fields.name: renewalOptions

noticeDeadline.description: Deadline to exercise the renewal option

rentBasis.description: How rent is determined for the renewal (fair market value, fixed, formula)

fields.description: Renewal and extension options with exercise deadlines

fields.name: riskItems

description.description: Description of the risk or flagged item

fields.description: Risk items including hidden costs, unusual provisions, personal guarantees, and relocation clauses

fields.name: fullReport
fields.description: Complete structured analysis covering all 9 sections: Parties and Premises, Lease Term, Rent and Financial Obligations, Permitted Use, Renewal Options, Landlord Obligations, Tenant Obligations, Default and Remedies, and Special Provisions

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Overall confidence in the analysis quality based on document completeness and clarity

examples.input:
COMMERCIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

This Lease Agreement ('Lease') is entered into as of March 1, 2026, by and between:

Sunrise Properties LLC, a Florida limited liability company ('Landlord'), and
BrightPath Consulting Inc., a Florida corporation ('Tenant').

PREMISES: Suite 400, 1200 Innovation Drive, Orlando, FL 32801. Approximately 3,500 square feet of office space.

TERM: Five (5) years, commencing April 1, 2026 through March 31, 2031.

BASE RENT: $28.00 per square foot per year ($8,166.67/month). Annual 3% escalation beginning Year 2.

SECURITY DEPOSIT: $16,333.34 (two months' rent).

OPERATING EXPENSES: Tenant responsible for pro-rata share (estimated $8.50/sf/year).

RENEWAL: One (1) five-year renewal option at fair market value. Written notice required 180 days before expiration.

PERMITTED USE: General office and consulting services only...

output.executiveSummary: Five-year commercial office lease at Suite 400, 1200 Innovation Drive, Orlando, FL. Base rent: $28.00/sf/year ($8,166.67/month) with 3% annual escalation. Estimated total annual cost including operating expenses: $127,750 ($36.50/sf). Security deposit: $16,333.34. One five-year renewal option at FMV with 180-day notice required by October 4, 2030.
output.premises: Suite 400, 1200 Innovation Drive, Orlando, FL 32801. Approximately 3,500 square feet of office space.

keyDates.description: Renewal option exercise deadline (180 days before expiration)

financialTerms.escalationSchedule: 3% annual increase beginning Year 2. Year 1: $28.00/sf, Year 2: $28.84/sf, Year 3: $29.71/sf, Year 4: $30.60/sf, Year 5: $31.52/sf

riskItems.description: Renewal rent at fair market value — no cap or collar, exposing tenant to market rate risk
Permitted use restricted to 'general office and consulting services only' — may limit future business pivots

output.fullReport:
## 1. Parties and Premises
Landlord: Sunrise Properties LLC (FL LLC). Tenant: BrightPath Consulting Inc. (FL corp). Premises: Suite 400, 1200 Innovation Drive, Orlando, FL 32801 — approx. 3,500 sf office space.

## 2. Lease Term
Five years: April 1, 2026 through March 31, 2031.

## 3. Rent and Financial Obligations
Base rent $28.00/sf/year with 3% annual escalation. Operating expenses estimated at $8.50/sf/year. Security deposit: $16,333.34.

## 4-9. [Remaining sections require full document review]

metadata.author: migration
metadata.description: Analysis of commercial and residential lease agreements to extract rent obligations, lease term, renewal options, permitted use, tenant and landlord obligations, and termination rights
